text: The front camera system shall output video frames with a resolution of at least 1920 x 1080 pixels at 30 fps when ambient illumination is between 1 lux and 100000 lux.
The front camera shall detect lane markings in all weather conditions.
The camera system shall provide a valid image stream to the ADAS ECU within 500 ms after ignition-on at supply voltage from 9 V to 16 V.
The camera system shall provide the first valid image frame to the ADAS ECU within 2 s after ignition-on.
The camera shall not transmit image data when the vehicle speed is greater than 120 km/h.
The camera system shall transmit image data continuously while the vehicle speed is between 0 km/h and 200 km/h.
The zone controller shall tolerate reverse battery connection of -14 V for 60 s without permanent damage.
The zone controller shall withstand reverse battery connection.
The zone controller shall send the door lock status on CAN message ZC_DoorStatus every 100 ms with a tolerance of +/- 10 ms.
The zone controller shall send the door lock status periodically on the vehicle network.
The zone controller shall store a diagnostic trouble code within 1 s after detecting an overcurrent condition on any protected high-side output.
